name: Evian Natural Mineral Water 1.5L
explanation: Contains only natural mineral water. No haram or suspicious ingredients. Clearly halal.

name: Spam Classic 340g

ingredientWarnings.pork: Pork is explicitly forbidden in Islamic dietary law.

explanation: Contains pork as primary ingredient. Definitively haram.

ingredientWarnings.gelatin: Gelatin is typically derived from pork and is haram unless certified halal.
ingredientWarnings.natural and artificial flavors: Flavor source not specified on label; may be animal-derived.

name: Nutella 400g

ingredientWarnings.whey powder: Whey is a dairy by-product. Halal if produced without pork-derived rennet.
ingredientWarnings.lecithin (soy): Lecithin (E322) may be animal-derived; soy source is acceptable but requires verification.
ingredientWarnings.vanillin: Synthetic vanillin is generally halal, but natural vanillin can be alcohol-extracted.

explanation: No definitively haram ingredients found. Whey powder, lecithin, and vanillin require source verification for full halal compliance.

name: Oatly Oat Drink 1L
explanation: Plant-based product with no animal-derived ingredients. Halal.
